## Problem

What can't you do right now that you want to do?

## Proposed solution

How should DeltaLens behave?

## Alternative approaches

What else have you considered?

## Context

- What Delta ecosystem tooling do you currently use? (Databricks, delta-rs, Spark, etc.)
- Would you use a CLI flag or a config file for this?
